title: AI Workflow Automation Startup n8n Raises $180M, Valued At $2.5B
title_zh: AI 工作流自动化初创公司 n8n 获 1.8 亿美元融资，估值达 25 亿美元
full_text:
Funding
AI Workflow Automation Startup n8n Raises $180M, Valued At $2.5B
Oct 9, 2025 | By Kailee Rainse
Berlin-based AI startup n8n, which helps businesses automate workflows, has raised $180M in a Series C round, valuing the company at $2.5B.
SUMMARY
Berlin-based AI startup n8n, which helps businesses automate workflows, has raised $180M in a Series C round, valuing the company at $2.5B.
Follow us
Follow us
The round was led by US VC Accel, with participation from Meritech, Redpoint, Evantic, Visionaries Club, T Capital, NVentures, and existing investors Sequoia, HV Capital, Highland Europe, and Felicis Ventures.
Founded in 2019, n8n has now raised $240M in total, including a $60M round in March 2025.
n8n describes itself as an “AI orchestration platform,” enabling businesses to connect hundreds of apps, automate workflows, integrate large language models, and use AI agents to simplify complex business processes.
RECOMMENDED FOR YOU
Funding
Swiss Robotics Company ANYbotics Secures Over €127 Million To Expand Robot Workforce
Kailee Rainse
Sep 22, 2025
Funding
[Funding alert] Germany based Raydiax Secures €3.5m in Funding
Oliver Bennett
Oct 28, 2023
SaaS
Winnow: Sustainopreneurs Built A Multi-Million-Dollar Worth Business, Focused On Reducing Food Waste
Team SR
Feb 10, 2025
Read Also - Amsterda m’s Endeit Capital Leads €20M Funding Round For Stockholm-Based Eir Insurance
Jan Oberhauser, CEO and founder of n8n, said: "Billions have been poured into AI tools by businesses and governments, but many organisations are struggling to see meaningful results.
"The fundamental challenge for the largest organisations isn't accessing AI, it's orchestrating it effectively. N8n allows teams to build their own adaptable infrastructure for AI, developing truly flexible, customisable systems that recreate how organisations work."
n8n plans to use the funds to meet strong enterprise demand by expanding its engineering team, developing new features, and supporting international growth.
The platform serves over 3,000 enterprise clients, including Vodafone, Softbank, and Seat, and has grown revenues tenfold in the past year. Its ecosystem includes 700,000+ active developers contributing integrations, templates, and guides.
Ben Fletcher, partner at Accel, said: "Jan and the n8n team balance power and simplicity to bring AI automation to all users. n8n’s platform has become the brain behind the orchestration for numerous workflows within enterprises, government organisations, and AI builders.
"The explosive customer momentum is coupled with an impressive, vibrant community around n8n. We’re thrilled to be joining the n8n team on their journey, turning the promise of AI into a reality!”
About n8n
n8n is a workflow automation platform that integrates AI with business processes, offering the flexibility of code and the speed of no-code. It enables enterprises to automate tasks, connect applications and streamline operations efficiently.
